_meta.purpose: Demo brief — Alpine Harvest Organic Trail Mix, EU market. Scandinavian craft aesthetic with dark berry variant.
_meta.data_origin: Created for Phase A/B final wrap-up.

cultural_context: Scandinavian organic craft aesthetic. Brown kraft paper tones, moss green, deep forest colors. Nordic botanical illustration style — berries, leaves, pine branches. Honest craftsmanship and sustainability values.

products.name: Alpine Harvest Trail Mix
products.description: European organic blend of hazelnuts, walnuts, sunflower seeds, and dried bilberries — inspired by Nordic foraging traditions

products.name: Alpine Harvest Trail Mix
products.description: Rich Nordic berry blend with dark chocolate, dried lingonberries, blackcurrants, and roasted hazelnuts

audience: sustainability-conscious organic food shoppers 28-50 across Northern and Western Europe
